title: User starts in PR module, asks to convert to PO — bot navigates module boundary
user_persona: Buyer who has an approved PR and wants to fulfil it via PO

conversation.user: I have approved purchase request PR-2026-1100. Convert it to a PO with supplier SUP-100.

bot_must: fetch PR header + lines from PR module (cross-module read)
validate PR status = Approved (cannot convert if not approved)
lock PoCrt journey for the PO side
plan to walk PR Coverage splice (POCRTMAINLNK9) after capturing PO header

conversation.user: Use the PR's currency and buyer. Today's date.

bot_must: inherit currency and buyer from PR
ask for numbering_series and any PO-specific fields not in PR
copy PR lines as PO lines

conversation.user: Numbering PO/STD/2026. All PR lines map 1-to-1 to PO lines.

bot_must: create 1-to-1 PR line → PO line coverage mapping
save coverage and return to main
fire POCRTMAINSBT with PR coverage attached
PR-2026-1100 status updated in PR module to 'Covered by PO' (cross-module write — via SP or callback)
report PO number and confirm PR is now covered

evaluation_metrics.pr_status_validated: PR must be Approved before allowing conversion
evaluation_metrics.coverage_mapping_persisted: PR coverage mapping saved via POCRTMAINLNK9
